description: Expressway approach to a multi-car rear-end pileup, 30 s. Ego speed profile brakes 24 -> 5 m/s from t=16 as the camera car approaches the event - exercises leader-gap closing, relative-speed sign, and the advisory slowdown path. Camera block fitted by calibration/auto_horizon.py (213 detections, MAD 6.4 px; fx assumes 100 deg HFOV).
